message:
docs: link session transcript from article, enable GitHub Pages

Added link to the full Claude Code session transcript at the end of the
Encrypted GitHub Issues article. The HTML is served via GitHub Pages at:
https://dicklesworthstone.github.io/misc_coding_agent_tips_and_scripts/cc_session_making_encrypted_gh_issues_system.html

GitHub Pages enabled on main branch (root path) for this repo.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
